reasoning: Based on conclusive media reporting, Donald Trump did not announce his pick for the next Federal Reserve Chair in 2025. On December 2, 2025, he explicitly stated he would make the announcement "early next year" (2026). Subsequently, on January 29, 2026, he indicated the announcement would happen the next morning, and on January 30, 2026, he officially nominated Kevin Warsh as the next Fed Chair. Therefore, Trump successfully refrained from announcing a next Fed Chair in 2025, meeting the criteria for a YES resolution.
